title: Make Leitstand the single general operator display
goal: Consolidate general operator status into Leitstand while keeping Cabinet semantic, Schauwerk visual and source-system views specialized and authoritative only within their boundaries.

acceptance.assertion: Every general panel names its primary source, freshness and non-authoritative display boundary.
Generic status panels duplicated in Cabinet or Schauwerk are identified and source-linked, specialized or retired.
The human operator has one documented general status entry without removing specialist Cabinet or Schauwerk workflows.
Leitstand failure leaves source CLIs and direct views available and does not block operation.
